title: cyclosorus wollastonii
intro: Cyclosorus wollastonii, also known as the Wollaston's fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of fern that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cyclosorus wollastonii are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
